terms.definition: A special IPython command prefixed with % (line) or %% (cell) that adds notebook features like timing, installs and environment control.
A magic prefixed with a single % that operates on the rest of its line.
A magic prefixed with %% that must start a cell and operates on the whole cell.
Running a system shell command from a notebook cell by prefixing it with !, optionally capturing its output.
The notebook mode (entered with Esc) where keystrokes act on cells (add, delete, change type) rather than editing text.
An IPython extension that re-imports edited modules automatically so code changes take effect without restarting the kernel.
